subject: FW:  Southridge Funds- March  2008- Update
body:
This is a friend of Sheridan Gibson's.  Sheridan gave her my email  and
asked that I pass this girls info to you.  This is actually Gabrielle's
2nd time to reach out to  you.

 

From: Gabrielle Guttman [mailto:gguttman@southridgecapital.com] 
Sent: Thursday, May 01, 2008 1:33 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Southridge Funds- March 2008- Update 

 

  
Lesley,

As we briefly discussed when we spoke last year,  Southridge is a
diversified financial holding company offering a wide range of products
and services, including investment management, merchant banking, and
investment banking.  The firm's offerings are delivered through two
primary divisions:
      
        *       Fund Management, devoted to various  financial
strategies or products, including structured finance,  asset-based
lending, and quantitative methods; and
        *       Financial Services, providing investment banking,
merchant banking, asset management, and brokerage products and services.
      
For your reference, attached please find the estimated  March 2008
performance update for the Southridge Managed Funds by strategy.  Please
refer to the individual fund summaries for important legal disclosures
on the performance presented  herein. I've also included an interview
with our founder Stephen Hicks to give you some background on us.
         
     
        A)  Structured Finance:
        Fund:   Southridge Partners LP (onshore)/Southshore Capital Fund
Ltd (offshore)
        March  08:  +1.64% (onshore)   +0.94% (offshore)
        YTD: +4.49%  (onshore)             +3.53% (offshore)
      
        B) Quant/Equity Market Neutral/Statistical Arbitrage:
        Fund: Double Alpha Group
        March 08:   +0.13%  (standard leverage)   +0.04% (enhanced
leverage)
        YTD:  -0.13% (standard leverage)   -1.60% (enhanced leverage)
        For more info on this fund, please log into www.doublealpha.com
and request access.
      
        C)  Asset-Based Lending:
        Fund: Southridge Real Estate Partners LP
        March  08:  +0.84%
        YTD: +2.66%
       

Thank you and please let me know a good time to follow-up with you to
set up a meeting.

Gabrielle


-----------------------------------------------
Gabrielle E. Guttman
VP, Business Development & Marketing
Southridge LLC
800 Third Ave 9th Floor
New York  NY 10022
212 994 9878 (phone)
212 994 9879 (fax)
917 363 4667 (mobile)
www.southridgellc.com


<http://www.southridgellc.com>
body_html:
This is a friend of Sheridan Gibson’s.  Sheridan gave her my email  and asked that I pass this girls info to you.  This is actually Gabrielle’s 2nd time to reach out to  you.

 

From: Gabrielle Guttman [mailto:gguttman@southridgecapital.com]
Sent: Thursday, May 01, 2008 1:33 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Southridge Funds- March 2008- Update

 

  
Lesley,

As we briefly discussed when we spoke last year,  Southridge is a diversified financial holding company offering a wide range of products and services, including investment management, merchant banking, and investment banking.  The firm’s offerings are delivered through two primary divisions:
      
        *       Fund Management, devoted to various  financial strategies or products, including structured finance,  asset-based lending, and quantitative methods; and
        *       Financial Services, providing investment banking, merchant banking, asset management, and brokerage products and services.
      
For your reference, attached please find the estimated  March 2008 performance update for the Southridge Managed Funds by strategy.  Please refer to the individual fund summaries for important legal disclosures on the performance presented  herein. I've also included an interview with our founder Stephen Hicks to give you some background on us.
         
     
        A)  Structured Finance:
        Fund:   Southridge Partners LP (onshore)/Southshore Capital Fund Ltd (offshore)
        March  08:  +1.64% (onshore)   +0.94% (offshore)
        YTD: +4.49%  (onshore)             +3.53% (offshore)
      
        B) Quant/Equity Market Neutral/Statistical Arbitrage:
        Fund: Double Alpha Group
        March 08:   +0.13%  (standard leverage)   +0.04% (enhanced leverage)
        YTD:  -0.13% (standard leverage)   -1.60% (enhanced leverage)
        For more info on this fund, please log into www.doublealpha.com and request access.
      
        C)  Asset-Based Lending:
        Fund: Southridge Real Estate Partners LP
        March  08:  +0.84%
        YTD: +2.66%
       

Thank you and please let me know a good time to follow-up with you to set up a meeting.

Gabrielle
